common.confirm_delete_desc: This action cannot be undone. Are you sure?

auth.rate_limited: Too many login attempts, please try again later
auth.reset_password_submitted: Password reset request submitted, the service will update the password on next startup
auth.reset_password_failed: Failed to submit password reset request
auth.reset_no_admin: No admin account found in database, please create one via environment variables
auth.reset_multiple_admins: Multiple admin accounts found in database, cannot automatically reset password
auth.reset_env_missing: Admin environment variables not configured, cannot reset password
auth.reset_username_mismatch: Environment variable admin name does not match database
auth.reset_pending: Password reset flag written, the service will automatically update the password on next startup
auth.reset_failed: Failed to submit password reset request
auth.password_too_short: New password must be at least 8 characters
auth.change_password_rate_limited: Too many password change attempts, please try again later

admin.platforms_desc: Manage upstream platform API configurations including load balancing, rate limiting, and priority settings
admin.keys_desc: Manage API Key creation, quota control, and access permissions
admin.models_desc: Manage model alias to target model mappings
admin.usage_desc: View detailed usage statistics and performance metrics for each API Key
admin.logs_desc: View API call logs and request statistics
admin.events_desc: View system events and alert information
admin.auto_model_desc: Configure auto model ID and view platform model discovery status
admin.request_templates_desc: Customize upstream request format with auto-injected fields
admin.data_manager_desc: Export and import system data for backup and migration
admin.system_keys_desc: Manage admin API authentication keys, cannot be used for v1 proxy
admin.dm_system_config_desc: Platforms, model mappings, proxies, plans, etc.
admin.dm_business_data_desc: API Keys, request logs, statistics, audit logs, etc.
admin.dm_drop_hint: Click or drag a file here
admin.dm_tip_migrate: • Migrating to a new server: export first, then import
admin.dm_tip_no_overwrite: • Only imports new data, never overwrites or deletes existing data
admin.dm_tip_skip_existing: • Existing data (matched by name or address) will be skipped
admin.dm_err_json_only: Only JSON files can be imported
admin.dm_progress_history_detail: Audit logs, system events, request logs
admin.dm_step_request_logs_detail: Large dataset, may take a while

platform.name: Platform Name
platform.fields_required: Platform name, base URL and API Key are required
platform.additional_keys_tip: First line is primary key, additional lines are secondary keys for round-robin load balancing

api_key.name: Key Name
api_key.save_warning: Please save this key securely, it will not be shown again:

model_map.fields_required: Model alias and target model are required

usage.prompt_tokens_desc: Total input tokens across all requests
usage.completion_tokens_desc: Total output tokens across all requests
usage.avg_ttft_desc: Average first token latency for streaming responses
usage.trend_empty_hint: Data will appear here after sending API requests

dashboard.total_requests_desc: Cumulative number of all API requests
dashboard.total_tokens_desc: Total tokens consumed by all requests
dashboard.active_keys_desc: Number of currently enabled API keys
dashboard.active_platforms_desc: Number of currently active upstream platforms

system.admin_init_desc: Admin account set via environment variables, created automatically on first start
system.auto_model_desc: When configured, requests to this model ID will automatically round-robin across all available platforms.
system.auto_model_regenerated: Auto model ID has been regenerated
system.auto_model_select_desc: Select models from discovered models to participate in auto routing. Supports search and multi-select.
system.request_templates_desc: Customize upstream request format with auto-injected fields
system.rt_desc_placeholder: Describe the purpose of this template
system.rt_merge_body_help: Deep-merge this JSON into upstream request body
system.rt_delete_confirm: Are you sure to delete this template?

api.missing_params_chat: Missing required model or messages parameter
api.missing_params_complete: Missing required model or prompt parameter
api.upstream_no_stream: Upstream did not return a streaming response

init.reset_mismatch: Password reset failed: admin name mismatch

notify.platform_down_detail: Platform "{name}" has failed {count} times consecutively and has been automatically circuit-broken. Please check the upstream service status.
notify.key_quota_detail: API Key "{name}" has exhausted its token quota and has been automatically disabled.

home.feature_multi_platform_desc: Support any OpenAI-compatible platform with weighted load balancing and automatic failover
home.feature_sse_desc: Full support for Chat Completions / Completions streaming and non-streaming proxy
home.feature_key_mgmt_desc: Flexible key distribution, quota control, plan templates and usage tracking
home.feature_circuit_breaker_desc: Automatic circuit breaker recovery, platform-level RPM/TPM rate limiting for system stability
home.feature_usage_desc: Detailed request logs, token usage statistics, audit logs and system events
home.feature_sdk_compat_desc: Standard /v1 path, compatible with OpenAI SDK, just modify base_url to connect
home.hero_description: Intelligent OpenAI API proxy router. Multi-platform load balancing, automatic circuit breaker recovery, SSE streaming, token quota management — one-line config to connect, seamless SDK compatibility.
home.section_core_features_desc: Enterprise-grade proxy capabilities for OpenAI API, ready to use out of the box
home.section_quickstart_desc: Just modify base_url to connect, seamless SDK compatibility
home.step_config_env_desc: Set DATABASE_URL, JWT_SECRET, ADMIN and other environment variables
home.step_start_service_desc: docker-compose up -d for one-click startup with automatic database initialization
home.step_get_started_desc: Add upstream platforms and API Keys in the admin panel, modify base_url in your SDK to connect
